message:
feat: Implement TODO stubs with real functionality

Implement real functionality for multiple C-API object files:

- namespaceobject.zig: namespace_init with PyDict_Update
- classobject.zig: method_repr, method_richcompare, method_getattro,
  method_new, method_vectorcall, instancemethod_repr, instancemethod_new,
  FT_CLEAR_WEAKREFS support
- fileobject.zig: PyFile_GetLine with readline method call,
  PyFile_OpenCode with hook support, PyFile_OpenCodeObject path handling
- object.zig: PyObject_ASCII with UTF-8 to \uxxxx escape conversion,
  PyObject_Bytes with __bytes__ method call, PyObject_TypeCheck MRO walk,
  PyObject_GenericGetAttr/SetAttr with descriptor protocol,
  PyCallable_Check with type dict lookup, PyObject_GetItem/SetItem
  sequence index handling, PyObject_GetIter with PySeqIter_New,
  PyObject_Dir with __dir__ method and dict iteration,
  PyObject_Format with __format__ method call
- call.zig: Fix missing pystate.zig import (use std.heap.c_allocator)

830+ lines of real implementations replacing TODO stubs.
